en.heading: Research Interests
en.intro: I work at the intersection of natural language processing and large language models, with a hands-on, experiment-driven approach to evaluation and applied machine learning.

items.title: Natural Language Processing
items.body: Language-centered problems such as legal information retrieval and document-grounded extraction, including citation retrieval over Swiss legal text and handwriting-to-structured-data pipelines.

items.title: Large Language Models
items.body: LLM reasoning and adaptation, including parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA/PEFT) workflows and OCR-plus-evidence pipelines for document-grounded tasks.

items.title: Evaluation & Benchmarks
items.body: Reproducible benchmarking and careful scoring, from reasoning benchmarks like ARC-AGI to threshold tuning, leaderboard tracking, and hashed manifests for verifiable runs.

items.title: Applied Machine Learning
items.body: Reproducible pipelines across diverse Kaggle and ML competitions — bioacoustics, detection, tabular prediction, and more — with public experiment logs and submission artifacts.

zh.heading: 研究方向
zh.intro: 我的工作处于自然语言处理与大语言模型的交叉地带，注重动手实验，并将其延伸到模型评测与应用型机器学习。

items.title: 自然语言处理
items.body: 聚焦以语言为核心的问题，如法律信息检索与基于文档的信息抽取，包括瑞士法律文本的引用检索，以及手写内容转结构化数据的流程。

items.title: 大语言模型
items.body: 关注大语言模型的推理与适配，涵盖参数高效微调（LoRA/PEFT）流程，以及面向文档任务的 OCR 加证据检索流程。

items.title: 评测与基准
items.body: 重视可复现的基准评测与严谨的评分，从 ARC-AGI 等推理基准，到阈值调优、排行榜跟踪，以及用于可验证实验的哈希清单。

items.title: 应用型机器学习
items.body: 在多样的 Kaggle 与机器学习竞赛中构建可复现流程——涵盖生物声学、目标检测、表格预测等——并公开实验日志与提交产物。
